module-2-notes-organizer-project.label: Project: Notes Organizer
module-2-notes-organizer-project.summary: Organize a messy folder into notes, homework, code, and backups using core Linux terminal commands.

module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.title: Create the notes intake folders
module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.prompt: A study group is dropping off two raw note files for sorting. Create `student-notes-organizer/inbox/math.txt` and `student-notes-organizer/inbox/history.txt` so both notes are ready in the intake folder.
module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.hint: This is a cumulative project step. Start from the previous workspace and add only the requested change.

help.concept: Project steps are connected. Preserve earlier deliverables and add one useful new piece of work.
help.hint_1: Use ls or find to check the current workspace before changing it.
help.hint_2: Do not delete files from earlier steps unless the prompt explicitly asks you to clean up a temporary file.

module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.starterCode: # Use the terminal for this Linux project step.

module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.title: Sort notes and create a backup
module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.prompt: The study group wants the notes filed before handoff. Move `math.txt` and `history.txt` out of `student-notes-organizer/inbox` and into `student-notes-organizer/classes`, then make a backup copy of `history.txt` at `student-notes-organizer/backups/history.txt`.
module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.hint: This is a cumulative project step. Start from the previous workspace and add only the requested change.

help.concept: Project steps are connected. Preserve earlier deliverables and add one useful new piece of work.
help.hint_1: Use ls or find to check the current workspace before changing it.
help.hint_2: Do not delete files from earlier steps unless the prompt explicitly asks you to clean up a temporary file.

module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.title: Finish the organizer handoff
module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.prompt: The notes are sorted and backed up. Leave a clear handoff marker by creating `student-notes-organizer/handoff/notes-ready.txt` while keeping the class notes and backup in place.
module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.hint: This is a cumulative project step. Start from the previous workspace and add only the requested change.

project-synopsis.title: Study Group Notes Organizer
project-synopsis.bodyMarkdown:
You are preparing a clean file handoff for a study group. Build an intake area, sort notes into class folders, preserve a backup, and leave a ready marker.

You will complete this as connected project steps. Each step starts from the previous working workspace, so do not delete earlier deliverables.
